posts.author: Cozstradamus
posts.content:
Beer - Out of Order: The Blesssssing!
Brewery - RaR Brewing (Cambridge, MD)
Style - Sour - Smoothie/Pastry
ABV - 5%
Review - Pretty decent.  Raspberry with cookies is a unique combination.  Doesn't go crazy but isn't the best.  Just average.
Rating - 3.26/5

posts.author: euphrates
posts.content: aside from beers i really wanna try to make a ****tail at home sometime, you people ever tried to make your own ****tail sometime? how did that taste?

posts.author: Xconchris
posts.content:
Former bartender and bartender manager here

Confused by your question  Euprates. A mixed drink/****tail can be as simple as a Rum & Coke.

You just pour 1ounce of Rum or more depending how strong you like it and add coke. That's it. Margaritas,  Long Island Ice teas and other drink are very basic to make. Same for Martinis and Manhattans.  If your thinking more elaborate like using a mudder for old fashion drinks, layering shots, or more complex i get, but mixed drinks are easy and most liquor stores sell mixed drinks already made in bottles as well if you dont want to do any work.

Dr Pepper shots were always a favorite to make. Shot of Armaretto in a half glass of beer. Taste like a dr pepper!!

posts.author: Xconchris
posts.content:
Also i get the technical difference between ****tail and mixed drink. Its not much, just juice or 3rd ingrediant. Something a long those lines.

Like Tequila Sunrise. I probably made hundreds. Shot of tequila,  orange juice and rain down some grenadine to make it look pretty for the women......or myself:)

posts.author: euphrates

posts.content:
Vegas Bombs used to be super popular. I dont know if they are anymore.

Half a Glass of Red Bull

The Shot you drop in is Peach Schnapps and Crown Royal Whiskey. Think i had heart palpitations i took so many when i worked.

posts.author: Cozstradamus
posts.content:
Vegas bombs are great if you are 22 and want to wake up in someone else's bed.  Jagerbombs are great too especially at Apres ski.  I once had a shot in Austria that had horseradish and prosciutto - it was insane but also great

posts.author: Steve Terry
posts.content: I've had loads of Jägerbombs as they seem to be the go to shot when someone in a group decides to get shots or at least that's the case around here anyway. The trouble is, over the last year or so, I've noticed they don't seem to have the same effect that they used to when I was younger and couldn't handle my drink as well which means if I'm on a night out where I'm trying to get pissed, I have to end up doing more of them which costs more plus the price of them (and every other form of alcohol) continues to rise. Anyone have any recommendations about what to ask for to make them a bit stronger or another type of shot with a similar taste to Jägerbombs?

posts.author: Bellatrix
posts.content: I used to have a pretty high tolerance as I pretty much only drank liquor neat.  Mezcal, rum and whiskey seemed to go down the easiest, and there were cheap versions of all of them.  Personally, I didn't shoot it, I just ordered a shot-equivalent amount and sipped it.  Six fingers seemed to be my driving limit back in the day.  I got pulled over once for speeding while drunk, but the officer only gave me a speeding ticket.  Another time I got pulled over for driving the wrong way on a one way street while drunk, but I only got a ticket for driving the wrong way (and basically for being blonde on the road--the lady cops were laughing at me).  I probably have a dangerous sense of confidence in my ability to drive while inebriated given how frequently I've gotten away with it.  I've cut back on my drinking quite a bit--both in frequency and volume.  A few years ago I lost a good friend to organ failure due to alcohol use.  They used to drink to the point of blacking out every night.  I don't recommend drinking that much.  I've only blacked out a couple of times, and its always been a net negative experience.

posts.author: Steve Terry
posts.content:
@Bellatrix

I think I've only ever been completley black out drunk maybe 3 or 4 times and yeah, it's not fun. Most of the time when I go out to get drunk, I get drunk but can still make my way back home, usually by Uber but even that is maybe only once every couple of months these days. I still drink most days but I usually stay within about 5 or 6 pints to get a little drunk but still end up fine the next day.
